## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / web UI improvement
- [ ] SysEx captures or specification update
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests -q`
- [ ] `cd web-ui && npm test` (if web UI touched)
- [ ] `python run.py` run and generated outputs committed (if analyzer/export/captures changed)
- [ ] `cd web-ui && npm run build` (if web UI build paths changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused; unrelated changes are split out or omitted
- [ ] Generated files (`specification/`, `analysis.json`, `web-ui/public/`, `web-ui/src/generated/`) were produced by `python run.py`, not hand-edited
- [ ] New `.syx` captures follow [docs/capture-guide.md](../docs/capture-guide.md) naming conventions
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under the [Apache License 2.0](../LICENSE)
